conflict: Theo reads Eli's sudden arrival as another version of abandonment and refuses sentimental reset.
consequence: Theo allows Eli two nights on the couch under explicit rules, forcing direct reckoning with past parenting failures.
must_land_beats: Unexpected arrival at Theo's apartment door
Theo recounts a specific rehab-era moment when Eli withdrew instead of staying
Eli accepts practical house rules he would once have treated as disrespect
objective: Find temporary shelter with his older son Theo in St. Louis.
